generation.policy: Fixed committed fixtures. Never regenerate during evaluation or CI.

pairs.visualInvariant: Same spaghetti meal, bowl, place setting, crop, and lighting. Only the tomato sauce is removed.
pairs.basePrompt: Overhead smartphone photo of plain spaghetti generously coated in visible red tomato marinara sauce, with no other ingredients.
pairs.editPrompt: Remove all tomato sauce while preserving the same spaghetti, bowl, place setting, crop, and lighting.

visualReview.notes: Tomato removal is clear and no replacement ingredient was introduced.

pairs.visualInvariant: Same plate, rice, place setting, crop, and lighting. Only chicken preparation changes from breaded fried to plain grilled.
pairs.basePrompt: Overhead smartphone photo of three visibly breaded deep-fried chicken pieces with plain white rice.
pairs.editPrompt: Replace only the fried chicken with three plain grilled chicken pieces while preserving the rice and scene.

visualReview.notes: Preparation change is unambiguous and the rice and scene remain stable.

pairs.visualInvariant: Same creamy pasta and scene. Only the visible serving size changes from oversized to about one third as much.
pairs.basePrompt: Overhead smartphone photo of an oversized bowl-filling portion of creamy fettuccine.
pairs.editPrompt: Reduce only the creamy pasta portion to about one third while preserving the bowl and scene.

visualReview.notes: The smaller portion remains the same food and the serving-size difference is obvious.

pairs.visualInvariant: Same rice bowl, amount, place setting, crop, and lighting. Only the red hot sauce is removed.
pairs.basePrompt: Overhead smartphone photo of plain white rice with a generous visible zigzag of bright red hot chili sauce.
pairs.editPrompt: Remove every trace of the hot sauce while preserving the same rice and scene.

visualReview.notes: Sauce removal is complete and no other food changed.

pairs.visualInvariant: Same grilled chicken, rice, plate, place setting, crop, and lighting. Only the cream sauce is removed.
pairs.basePrompt: Overhead smartphone photo of grilled chicken covered by thick pale cream sauce with plain white rice.
pairs.editPrompt: Remove only the cream sauce while preserving the same grilled chicken, rice, and scene.

visualReview.notes: Cream sauce removal is clear and the chicken and rice remain unchanged.

pairs.visualInvariant: Same glass, ice, liquid level, table, plate, napkin, crop, and lighting. Only cola becomes still water.
pairs.basePrompt: Eye-level smartphone photo of an unbranded glass of dark cola with abundant visible carbonation bubbles.
pairs.editPrompt: Replace only the cola with clear still water and remove carbonation while preserving the scene.

visualReview.notes: The beverage replacement is unambiguous and the glass and background remain stable.
